reasoning: Your lactate clearance is currently limiting your performance, as seen by the 9.3% decline from 5-min to 20-min power. With the extended rest since your last ride, we're going to gradually increase intensity today. This workout will prepare you for the continuous efforts required in segments like the Alpine Loop climb.
